title: FadeCommand NNG payload
description: JSON payload sent inside NodeOperation.data when dispatching a fade to gradient-motiond. target='gradientengine' on the NodeOperation envelope. The payload is built in two layers: ActionHandler._build_payload returns the body fields; NodeCommunications.send_fade_command injects the envelope fields (command, fade_id, osc_host, curve_params).

command.description: Envelope. Discriminator: gradient-motiond dispatches on this field. Injected by send_fade_command.

fade_id.description: Envelope. Controller-assigned unique identifier. Equals str(FadeCue.uuid). Injected by send_fade_command.

osc_host.description: Envelope. OSC target host — always localhost for node-side players. Injected by send_fade_command.

osc_port.description: Body. OSC target port. AudioCue: target_cue._osc.remote_port. VideoCue: 7000.

start_value.description: Body. Initial level read from target_cue's Ossia node cache at dispatch time via target_cue._osc.get_value(osc_path). Native scale (0.0–1.0 for /volmaster and opacity).

target_value.description: Body. Target level on the FadeCue's UI scale (0–100). NOT normalised to 0.0–1.0; gradient-motiond is responsible for any unit conversion.

start_time.description: Body. MTC clock value in integer milliseconds at the moment of dispatch. Computed as mtc.main_tc.milliseconds_rounded. Used by gradient-motiond to synchronise curve evaluation to the show timecode.

duration_ms.description: Body. Fade duration in integer milliseconds. Computed as FadeCue.duration.milliseconds_rounded.

curve_type.description: Body. Lowercase string encoding of FadeCurveType enum value. Consumed by gradient-motiond's CurveFactory.

curve_params.description: Envelope. Reserved for future curve parameterisation. Always empty object {} in Phase 6. Injected by send_fade_command.
